tasks.subject: Task 1: Snake_case rename — submodules, packages, files, all references
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rename all PascalCase Python-facing modules, subpackages, and `.py` files to snake_case in one mechanical sweep. Foundational task — every subsequent task uses the renamed paths.

**Files:** src/bindings/function_registry.h, src/bindings/utils_bind.cpp, src/bindings/astro/tycho_astro.cpp, src/bindings/astro/kepler_model.cpp; git mv 6 tychopy/ subdirs; git mv 10 .py files; sweep tychopy/, examples/, tychopy/test/, scripts/.

**Verify:** `conda run -n tycho bash -c "MPLBACKEND=Agg python scripts/run_examples.py" && ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/bindings/function_registry.h","src/bindings/utils_bind.cpp","src/bindings/astro/tycho_astro.cpp","src/bindings/astro/kepler_model.cpp","tychopy/","examples/python_examples/","tychopy/test/","scripts/"],"verifyCommand":"conda run -n tycho bash -c \"MPLBACKEND=Agg python scripts/run_examples.py\" && ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure","acceptanceCriteria":["snake_case _tychopy submodules importable","PascalCase forms ImportError","all 38 examples pass","all C++ tests pass","grep PascalCase submodules zero hits"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Drop duplicate PascalCase factory aliases
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove PascalCase mirrors of snake_case factory functions: Stack/StackScalar/Sum/SumElems/SumScalar from tychopy/vector_functions/__init__.py and ModifiedDynamics from tychopy/astro/__init__.py. Update in-tree call sites.

**Verify:** `conda run -n tycho python -c "from tychopy.vector_functions import stack, sum; print('ok')" && examples PASS`

```json:metadata
{"files":["tychopy/vector_functions/__init__.py","tychopy/astro/__init__.py","tychopy/astro/astro_models.py","tychopy/astro/Extensions/EPPRFrame.py","tychopy/test/test_FullProblems/test_FreeFlyingRobot.py","tychopy/test/test_Astro/test_vec6_dispatch.py","examples/python_examples/MultiPhaseZermelo.py","examples/python_examples/Zermelo.py"],"verifyCommand":"conda run -n tycho bash -c \"MPLBACKEND=Agg python scripts/run_examples.py\" && conda run -n tycho python -m pytest tychopy/test/","acceptanceCriteria":["snake_case factories importable","PascalCase aliases ImportError","examples pass","tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Migrate C++ builder and tests to new OCP link API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update ocp_wrapper.h and 2 C++ tests to call new add_forward_link_equal_con and add_direct_link_equal_con overloads with std::string("auto") for ScaleType. Precondition for Task 5.

**Verify:** `cd build && ninja -j6 all && ctest --test-dir . --output-on-failure`

```json:metadata
{"files":["include/tycho/detail/optimal_control/builder/ocp_wrapper.h","tests/cpp/optimal_control/test_ocp_direct_link.cpp","tests/cpp/optimal_control/test_ocp_phase_lifetime.cpp"],"verifyCommand":"cd build && ninja -j6 all && ctest --test-dir . --output-on-failure","acceptanceCriteria":["wrapper uses new API","tests use 7-arg form","C++ tests pass","examples pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Migrate Python examples and tests to new OCP link API; merge UpdatedInterface/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Eliminate every Python call to a legacy OCP link API form. Replace duplicated parent files with UpdatedInterface/ versions; inline-migrate parent-only legacy-API files by adding auto_scale='auto'; delete UpdatedInterface/ after merging.

**Verify:** `conda run -n tycho bash -c "MPLBACKEND=Agg python scripts/run_examples.py" && conda run -n tycho python -m pytest tychopy/test/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["examples/python_examples/UpdatedInterface/","examples/python_examples/MultiSpacecraftOptimization.py","examples/python_examples/Heteroclinic.py","examples/python_examples/MultiPhaseZermelo.py","examples/python_examples/MeshRefinement/Delta3Launch.py","tychopy/test/test_AdaptiveMesh/test_Delta3Launch.py","tychopy/test/test_AutoScaling/test_ObjScaling.py","tychopy/test/test_FullProblems/test_MultiPhaseCannon.py","tychopy/test/test_FullProblems/test_Delta3Launch.py"],"verifyCommand":"conda run -n tycho bash -c \"MPLBACKEND=Agg python scripts/run_examples.py\" && conda run -n tycho python -m pytest tychopy/test/","acceptanceCriteria":["UpdatedInterface gone","all 38 examples pass","Python tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Remove legacy OCP link API (Python bindings + C++ class overloads)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete BuildOldLinkIterface() (~310 lines), rename build_new_link_interface → build_link_interface, delete LinkConstraint/LinkObjective nb::class_ registrations and Python aliases, delete legacy overloads from optimal_control_problem.h. Keep LinkConstraint/LinkObjective types as internal C++ implementation detail.

**Verify:** `cd build && ninja -j6 all && ctest --test-dir . --output-on-failure && cd .. && conda run -n tycho bash -c "MPLBACKEND=Agg python scripts/run_examples.py"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/bindings/optimal_control/optimal_control_problem_bind.cpp","src/bindings/optimal_control/tycho_optimal_control.cpp","tychopy/optimal_control/__init__.py","include/tycho/detail/optimal_control/phase/optimal_control_problem.h"],"verifyCommand":"cd build && ninja -j6 all && ctest --test-dir . --output-on-failure && cd .. && conda run -n tycho bash -c \"MPLBACKEND=Agg python scripts/run_examples.py\"","acceptanceCriteria":["legacy bindings deleted","legacy C++ overloads deleted","grep zero hits","examples pass","C++ tests pass"]}
```

**Deferred from Task 3 review:**
- Update docstring for `add_forward_link_equal_con` in ocp_wrapper.h to mention return is `std::vector<int>` (one index per consecutive phase pair).
- Replace the 6 `std::string("auto")` literals in ocp_wrapper.h with `ScaleModes::AUTO` enum literal (avoids string round-trip via strto_ScaleMode; safer typing). Verify `optimal_control_flags.h` is included or add it.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Internal C++ binding helper rename to snake_case
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rename TychoBind<T>::Build → ::build, Build_Register → build_register, and *Build aggregate free functions to snake_case (vector_functions_build, solvers_build, optimal_control_build, utils_build, astro_build, extensions_build, kepler_utils_build, lambert_solvers_build). Internal-only — does not affect Python API.

**Verify:** `cd build && ninja -j6 all && cd .. && conda run -n tycho python -c "import _tychopy; _tychopy.software_info()"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/bindings/function_registry.h","src/bindings/tycho_module.cpp","src/bindings/bump_allocator_bind.cpp","src/bindings/utils_bind.cpp","src/bindings/astro/","src/bindings/optimal_control/","src/bindings/solvers/","src/bindings/vf/"],"verifyCommand":"cd build && ninja -j6 all && cd .. && conda run -n tycho python -c \"import _tychopy; _tychopy.software_info()\" && ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure","acceptanceCriteria":["TychoBind::Build → ::build","Build_Register → build_register","*Build → *_build","build succeeds","examples pass","clang-format clean"]}
```
